subcodes.first_line: O friends! This transient and disordered earth, this ephemeral dust-heap abode, befitteth naught but crows and owls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان این بیسر و سامان خاکدان فانی آشیان ترابیست زاغ و زغن را شاید و بوم
subcodes.subjects: @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @call to action, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
